objective: Add Alibaba Token Plan International (ap-southeast-1) provider support to OpenCodex. Research international token plan API, add provider entry, GUI chip, tests, and verify.

workPhases.title: Research + implement alibaba-token-plan-intl provider entry, GUI metadata, and tests

tasks.title: Research international token plan API via agbrowse + web fetch
Add alibaba-token-plan-intl registry entry in registry.ts

criteria.scenario: alibaba-token-plan-intl provider entry exists in PROVIDER_REGISTRY with correct international base URL
criteria.expectedEvidence: registry.ts contains entry with id alibaba-token-plan-intl and international base URL
criteria.capturedEvidence: Committed 7e63d2e0: registry.ts line ~775 has alibaba-token-plan-intl entry with baseUrl from ALIBABA_INTL_TOKEN_PLAN_BASE_URL (ap-southeast-1 token plan)

criteria.scenario: GUI icon, display name, and brand color mappings exist for all alibaba* provider IDs
criteria.expectedEvidence: provider-icons.ts has entries for alibaba, alibaba-token-plan, alibaba-token-plan-intl in PROVIDER_ICON_ALIASES, PROVIDER_DISPLAY_NAMES, PROVIDER_BRAND_COLORS
criteria.capturedEvidence: Hubble worker verified: 9 entries across 3 maps, tsc clean. Evidence: .codexclaw/evidence/provider-icons-alibaba-gui-metadata.md

criteria.scenario: bun run typecheck passes with zero errors
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun run typecheck: clean (exit 0). Ran during C phase verification.

criteria.scenario: All provider-registry-parity and qwen-cloud-endpoints tests pass
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test exits 0 with all tests passing
criteria.capturedEvidence: 31 pass, 0 fail, 327 expect() calls across 2 test files (provider-registry-parity + qwen-cloud-endpoints). Ran during C phase.
